pageHeader.title: Pricing
pageHeader.subtitle: Two simple ways to work together: pay once and own it, or keep everything managed for you monthly.

hero.subtitle: Transparent pricing for small businesses in Toronto and beyond. No surprise invoices — just a clear build, optional monthly care, and honest hourly work when you need it.

spark.name: SPARK
spark.tagline: Hourly updates when you need them.
spark.footnote: 2 hour minimum. For fixes or scope outside your plan.

monthlyCare.tagline: Care, hosting, and small updates handled for you.
features: Full site build — no large upfront fee

items.title: FAST LAUNCH
items.body: Modern stacks and lean handoffs so your site ships on time and stays easy to extend.

items.title: SECURITY FIRST
items.body: SSL, sensible defaults, and maintenance options that keep your site and visitors safer.

items.title: CLEAN CODEBASE
items.body: Readable structure and docs so the next developer — or you — never hits a wall.

addOns.title: Extend the build
addOns.subtitle: Modular add-ons as your site grows — pages, design passes, and commerce.

cards.title: Extra pages
cards.desc: Standard, feature-rich, or dynamic — by complexity.

cards.title: Priority blocks
cards.desc: Reserved time for launches and urgent fixes.

consultCta.title: Need a custom build?
consultCta.body: Tell me what you sell, who you serve, and what's broken today — I'll recommend a simple path and honest pricing.
